title: Support glab CI pipeline filtering
description:
## Request

Add support for `glab ci` pipeline filtering.

<!-- internal tracking: PROJ-789 -->

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `rtk glab ci list` shows compact pipeline summary
- [ ] `rtk glab ci status` shows current pipeline status
- [ ] Token savings >= 80%

---

[![status](https://img.shields.io/badge/status-in_progress-yellow)](https://example.com)

title: rtk cargo test shows full output when no failures
description:
When all tests pass, `rtk cargo test` still shows verbose compilation output instead of just the summary line.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `rtk cargo test` in a project with all passing tests
2. Observe that compiler output is included

### Expected
Only show test summary when all tests pass.

### Actual
Full compiler warnings and test output shown.

title: Add Helm CLI support
description:
Helm CLI outputs are verbose. Would be great to have RTK support for:
- `helm list` (compact table)
- `helm status` (summary only)
- `helm install/upgrade` (ok confirmation)

Similar to how `rtk kubectl` works.

title: Binary size increased 30% after Python/Go modules
description:
After merging Python and Go support, stripped release binary went from 3.2MB to 4.1MB.

Investigate if we can:
- Use feature flags to make modules optional
- Reduce regex count (share patterns across modules)
- Review serde usage (maybe avoid full JSON parsing for simple cases)

title: rtk gain --history shows wrong dates on macOS
description:
On macOS, `rtk gain --history` shows dates in UTC instead of local timezone.

Fixed in v0.23.1.

title: Support TOML-based filter DSL
description:
Instead of writing Rust code for each new filter, allow users to define filters in TOML.

```toml
[[filter]]
command = "terraform plan"
pattern = "^(Plan|Apply|Error):"
format = "compact"
```

This would make RTK extensible without recompilation.

title: Improve error messages for missing commands
description:
When the underlying command is not installed (e.g., `rtk glab mr list` without glab), the error message is confusing:

```
Error: Failed to run glab mr list
```

Should say something like:
```
Error: glab not found. Install it: https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/cli
```

title: Add rtk completion command for shell completions
description:
Clap supports generating shell completions via `clap_complete`. Add a `rtk completion bash/zsh/fish` command.

This would help discoverability of available commands.

title: rtk read crashes on binary files
description:
Running `rtk read /path/to/binary.exe` panics with:
```
thread 'main' panicked at 'called `Result::unwrap()` on an `Err` value: Utf8Error'
```

Should detect binary files and skip filtering.

title: Track savings per project directory
description:
Currently `rtk gain` shows global stats. It would be useful to see savings broken down by project directory.

Proposal: store `cwd` in the tracking database and add `rtk gain --by-project` flag.
